Research-based angle to ensure your exemplary UX

The Real value of your business uncovered by research, brought to users by exemplary UX and elegant design

View Cases
scroll down Facebook Instagram

Exemplary cases of successful cooperation

  • Electronic Health Record Systems

    Electronic Health Record Systems

    Electronic Health Record Systems(EHR).

    Delivery:

    Hi-Fidelity Interaction Prototype, UI language, design for all pages, design systems.

    Challenges:

    The product is 16 years old. During this time, it was created and improved by varios experts. Thus. the product was extremly inconsistent and not user-friendly. Our task was to make a truly complex product easy to understand. And also make the development process undestandable and simple for the team.

    Result:

    We have overcome the challenge of consistency in huge product. We have created patterns, components, elements and bases from which everything is built.

    Read More

A few words about us

Who we are?

Hi-Fidelity Interaction Prototype, UI language, design for all pages, design systems.

Our Values and Culture

Hi-We believe that web-application users shouldn’t even notice the interface.They have to complete their work easily and be free for the rest of the time. Also, we pay a lot of attention to working with oue clients
